}} ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== ''To be announced. ===Format=== * '''TWOB Winter Invitational''' : ''December 19th, 2023 - January ??, 2024 ** Squad , {{Abbr/TPP}} * '''Pre-Quarter''' : ''December 19th, 2023 ** 16 teams. ** 8 invited teams , 8 teams from Open Qualifiers. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 4 teams}} qualify for the ''Quarter Finals. * '''Quarter Finals''' : ''December 20th - 21st, 2023 ** 24 teams. ** 20 invited, 4 teams from ''Pre-Quarter. ** 2 matchdays. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} qualify for the ''Semi Finals. * '''Semi Finals''' : ''December 22nd - 28th, 2023 ** 32 teams. ** 24 invited, 8 teams from ''Quarter Finals. ** 6 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 8 teams each. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for the ''Grand Finals. * '''Grand Finals''' : ''December 30th, January 2nd-6th ** 16 teams. ** 5 matchdays. ** 30 matches (6 each day). ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool|localcurrency=INR |{{Slot |localprize=750000 |{{Opponent|Team
